C1.note: packmol-memgen build: 128 DPPC (64/leaflet, verified in PLAN) + 5162 TIP3P waters, net-neutral, 32126 atoms (system.pdb). leap.log: Errors=0, only benign 256 improper-torsion + WAT connect warnings; box written with CRYST1. Topology sane.

C2.note: PLAN.md has full 4-tier FF table: LIPID21+TIP3P justified Tier-1 (Dickson 2022 PMID 35113553), Berendsen barostat/cut=10/tensionless NPT cited to RAG manual pages, no-salt justified Tier-1. RAG-first evident (p.50/51 Table 3.9, p.231). Only experimental-target values fell to Tier-3 (pubmed down during agent run) and were disclosed. No hardcoded defaults.

C3.note: All stages finished: min1/min2, heat (83s), equil1/2/3 (164/164/745s), prod.out shows full 100 ns / 1000 frames at 251 ns/day over 9.5 h. Stable: T=325.0 K, density 1.001 g/cc, APL std 0.07 Å² (results.json). No blow-up/NaN.

C4.note: analyze.py: APL = box_x*box_y/(128/2) per frame; thickness from P31 phosphate up/lower-leaflet z separation (D_PP); Scd = -0.5<3cos^2θ-1> over per-carbon C–H bonds vs z-normal across C2–C16, both chains, 800 frames (20–100 ns). Correct methods + all three requested observables.

C5.note: Paper-confirmed: Klauda 2010 (PMID 20496934) reports DPPC expt SA/lipid ~64 Å² (sim within 2%), Scd plateau ~0.2, density profiles matching diffraction. Agent: APL 62.8±0.1 Å² (key ~63, expt 64), thickness D_PP 38.5±0.2 Å (key 37–39), Scd plateau 0.19 (key/paper ~0.2). All within tolerance.
